results.title: Atlanta Stadium bucks World Cup pricing trend with Southern hospitality
results.description: ATLANTA, June 26 - In a World Cup beset by criticism over pricing, Atlanta Stadium, and the city as a whole, are providing relief to the wallets of soccer supporters, with fan-friendly food options, a free Fan Fest and cheap transportation.

results.title: Ivory Coast Coach Criticises Schweinsteiger’s ‘Racist’ Comment
results.description: Ivory Coast head coach Emerse Faé has criticised German football legend Bastian Schweinsteiger over comments he made about the West African side before Germany’s match against them. Speaking on German broadcaster ARD ahead of the game, Schweinsteiger described Ivory Coast’s style as “a bit African football, a bit unorthodox, a bit wild” and suggested the [...]

results.title: After Harry Kane 'Curse', 'Witch Doctor' Predicts Portugal As World Cup Winner
results.description: Nana Kwaku Bonsam previously grabbed headlines in 2014 for claiming he was behind Cristiano Ronaldo's injury ahead of Portugal's clash with Ghana.

results.title: Live updates: Trump says Iran broke ceasefire
results.description: President Trump on Friday afternoon said Iran had broken the terms of its ceasefire with the U.S., by shooting “at least four One Way Attack Drones at Ships transversing the Strait of Hormuz.” He called it a “foolish violation” of the pact.
